# Domain map — agentic-kanban

Generated 2026-07-20T20:36:41.733Z · stack: **node** · pnpm · monorepo

Read this first. It exists so you don't have to re-derive the layout of this repo
before starting work — that rediscovery is the single largest cold-start cost per ticket.

## Feedback commands

- **Install:** `pnpm install -r`
- **Quick test:** `pnpm test:mine`
- **Full test:** `pnpm test`
- **Build:** `pnpm build`
- **Typecheck:** `pnpm typecheck`
- **Lint:** `pnpm lint`
- **Dev server:** `pnpm dev`
